title: PPO/SNQI scenario-horizon smoke rerun
claim_boundary: Smallest post-repair scenario-horizon smoke slice only; not paper-facing Results evidence or full scenario-horizon promotion.
command: rtk scripts/dev/run_worktree_shared_venv.sh -- python scripts/dev/run_compact_validation.py --timeout-seconds 1800 -- scripts/dev/run_worktree_shared_venv.sh -- python scripts/tools/run_camera_ready_benchmark.py --config configs/benchmarks/issue_3266_scenario_horizon_ppo_snqi_smoke.yaml --output-root output/benchmarks/issue_3266 --campaign-id issue3266_ppo_snqi_smoke_live --mode run --skip-publication-bundle --log-level WARNING

snqi_contract.positioning_claim_scope: benchmark aggregate, not a universal ground-truth utility
snqi_contract.caveat: Degenerate metrics on this one-scenario slice cannot be used as independent validation signals: comfort_exposure, force_exceed_events.

interpretation.resolved: PPO runs natively on the scenario-horizon smoke path, passes the learned-policy contract, and contributes a benchmark-success row with no fallback/degraded status.
interpretation.not_resolved: This smoke does not promote a full paper-facing scenario-horizon Results claim.
interpretation.next_step: Run and promote a broader paper-facing scenario-horizon campaign before citing PPO/SNQI as Results evidence.
